creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: romain
Date: Mon Jul  8 19:05:27 2013
New Revision: 322532
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322532

Log:
  - Update to 3.0.12.
  - Unbreak on -CURRENT [1]

  Submitted by:	truckman [1]

Modified: head/lang/mono/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/mono/Makefile	Mon Jul  8 18:44:24 2013	(r322531)
+++ head/lang/mono/Makefile	Mon Jul  8 19:05:27 2013	(r322532)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	mono
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.3
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.12
 CATEGORIES=	lang
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.mono-project.com/sources/${PORTNAME}/

==============================================================================

==============================================================================
--- head/lang/mono/files/patch-configure	Mon Jul  8 18:44:24 2013	(r322531)
+++ head/lang/mono/files/patch-configure	Mon Jul  8 19:05:27 2013	(r322532)
@@ -3,16 +3,12 @@ $FreeBSD$
 
 --- configure.orig
 +++ configure
-@@ -3993,12 +3993,6 @@
- 
- 		libdl=
- 		libgc_threads=pthreads
--		# This doesn't seem to work as of 7.0 on amd64
--		with_sigaltstack=no
--# TLS is only partially implemented on -CURRENT (compiler support
--# but NOT library support)
--#
--		with_tls=pthread
- 		use_sigposix=yes
- 		;;
- 	*-*-*openbsd*)
+@@ -25136,7 +25136,7 @@
+ 	INTL="libintl.so.0"
+ 	;;
+     *-*-*freebsd*)
+-    	LIBC="libc.so"
++    	LIBC="libc.so.7"
+ 	INTL="libintl.so"
+ 	SQLITE="libsqlite.so"
+ 	SQLITE3="libsqlite3.so"
